sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48212" key="qeologei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεολογ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in the theatre, <sense id="n48212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a place above the stage where gods appeared</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
